per_criterion_scores.internal_note: Commands were generally precise but lacked full specificity in some areas, such as data privacy compliance.
The student effectively suggested statistical tests to assess overfitting more thoroughly.

justification: The student demonstrated partial understanding with effective guidance on overfitting but needed more specificity in correction commands and metric adjustments.
